description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The property features a large driveway with parking space, a swimming pool area, and a full-sized tennis court, all surrounded by a perimeter of tall, slender trees for privacy. The main building is rectangular with clean lines, large windows, and multiple outdoor seating areas, including a patio and a garden. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some darker accents on the roof and window frames. The tennis court and pool are integrated into the landscape, and the property is enclosed by a low wall and gates. The overall design emphasizes openness, outdoor living, and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a tennis court, pool, and landscaped grounds, surrounded by tall trees and a low wall.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front driveway, main entrance, and the tennis court to the right, with the pool and garden area to the left.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the tennis court in the foreground, the driveway and pool to the left, and the main building set back from the street.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear facade with large windows, outdoor seating, and the tennis court on the left, emphasizing the open backyard.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the side of the bungalow, showing the pool, driveway, and a partial view of the tennis court, with the main building centered.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
